title: Silmquinas e Equipamentos
description: ***.com.br zoominfo.com/c/silmquinas-e-equipamentos-ltda/425694871 Sil Maquinas is a Brazilian company specialising in the sale, rental, and servicing of construction, road-building, and agricultural machinery. Its product line includes rollers, pavers, excavators, and tractors from leading global brands. The company also supplies genuine parts and provides comprehensive after-sales support
